forager.brain

Class Brain

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.brain.Brain

  • public abstract class Brain
extends Object
    Brain of a Forager Game agent.

    Subclasses of this have to be redeveloped by participant. All the actions have to be taken during update, which increase hunger.

    No methods except update can be overriden.

    Author:
    Guillaume Desquesnes

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Brain()

    • Method Detail

      • init

        public final Brain init(AgentEntity parent)
        Initialize a new brain.
        Parameters:
        parent - The brain owner.

      • broadcast

        public final void broadcast(MessageContent message)
        Broadcast a message to all the agent in range.
        Parameters:
        message - The message.

      • canHarvest

        public final boolean canHarvest()
        Test if the agent can harvest.
        Returns:
        True if the agent can harvest, else false.

      • createCopulationMessage

        public final MessageContent createCopulationMessage()
        Create a message to ask for reproduction.
        Returns:
        A reproduction demand message.

      • createFoodRequestMessage

        public final MessageContent createFoodRequestMessage()
        Create a message to ask for food/energy.
        Returns:
        A food request message.

      • createLocationMessage

        public final MessageContent createLocationMessage(Rectangle position,
                                   String item)
        Create a message to indicate a ressource on the environnement.
        Parameters:
        position - The position of the item.
        item - The type of item.
        Returns:
        A ressource indication message.

      • copulate

        public final boolean copulate(MessageContent reply)
        Copulate with an other agent, once he is agree to do.
        Parameters:
        reply - The reply message to the demand of copulation.
        Returns:
        True if an agent has been created, else false.

      • die

        public final void die()
        Suicide command.

      • direction

        public final Vector2D direction()
        Get the last movement vector of the agent.
        Returns:
        The last movement vector.

      • distance

        public final double distance(AgentInfo other)
        Get the distance to an other agent.
        Parameters:
        other - Info on the other agent.
        Returns:
        The distance to an other agent.

      • distance

        public final double distance(Rectangle a,
              Rectangle b)
        Get the distace between two hitbox.
        Parameters:
        a - The first hitbox.
        b - The other hitbox.
        Returns:
        The distance between the two hitbox.

      • eat

        public final void eat(int quantity)
        Eat a food.
        Parameters:
        quantity - The desired quantity of food to eat.

      • give

        public final boolean give(AgentInfo ai,
           String item,
           int quantity)
        Give ressource to an other agent. The agent must be near you to do so, distance < 10.
        Parameters:
        ai - Info on the reciever.
        item - The type of item to give.
        quantity - The quantity of item.
        Returns:
        True if you gave something, else false.

      • getCollision

        public final List<FixedObject> getCollision()
        Get the list of object you collide with.
        Returns:
        The list of object who collide with the entity.

      • getQuantity

        public final int getQuantity(String item)
        Get the quantity of the item in your inventory.
        Parameters:
        item - The item type.
        Returns:
        The quantity of item.

      • getMessages

        public final List<MessageContent> getMessages()
        Get the list of messages recieved.
        Returns:
        The list of messages recieved.

      • getVisibleAgents

        public final List<AgentInfo> getVisibleAgents()
        Get the list of info on agent in your vision range.
        Returns:
        The list of info on agent in your vision range.

      • getVisibleObjects

        public final List<FixedObject> getVisibleObjects()
        Get the list of object in your vision range.
        Returns:
        The list of object in your vision range.

      • haveMessage

        public final boolean haveMessage()
        Test if you have unread message.
        Returns:
        True if you have new message, else false.

      • harvest

        public final int harvest(String item)
        Harvest a ressource.
        Parameters:
        item - The type of ressource to harvest.
        Returns:
        The quantity of ressource harvested.

      • hitbox

        public final Rectangle hitbox()
        Get the hitbox of the agent.
        Returns:
        The hitbox of the agent.

      • hunger

        public final double hunger()
        Get the level of hungriness.
        Returns:
        The level of hungriness.

      • isTeamMate

        public final boolean isTeamMate(AgentInfo ai)
        Test if the agent is a teammate.
        Parameters:
        ai - Info on the agent.
        Returns:
        True if the agent is a teammate, else false.

      • moveBy

        public final Vector2D moveBy(Vector2D direction)
        Move the agent by a vector.

        The vector norm will be in [0,1].

        Parameters:
        direction - The movement vector, not null.
        Returns:
        The effective movement vector.

      • replyTo

        public final void replyTo(MessageContent origin,
           boolean value)
        Send a reply to a message.
        Parameters:
        origin - The message to reply.
        value - Weither you reply positively or negatively.

      • sendMessage

        public final void sendMessage(MessageContent message,
               AgentInfo ai)
        Send a message to an other agent.
        Parameters:
        message - The message.
        ai - The agent.

      • update

        public abstract void update()
        What the brain plan to do at each step. Has to be overriden by subclasses.
